cooked:
Hello everyone!

Im glad to introduce the LBA: Lupin Island Destiny Mod Project to all you members of the MBN.

This project has as main protagonist our hero of all times: Twinsen!

Fergus asks Twinsen for some gas so he can use his hidroglider, an this is how the story begins!

Twinsen takes some gas from hes house at Tiliar Island, but, will he suceed?
What will happen to our hero during his adventure to Lupin Island?
What obstacles will he find?

All these questions will be answered when LBA:LID Project is released.

The member of this team are:

agustin
OBrasilo

Until now we have only some few grids and 2 musics

Anyone wanting to help this project contact us to lbacid@gmail.com
raw:
Hello everyone!
 
I'm glad to introduce the LBA: Lupin Island Destiny Mod Project to all you members of the MBN.
 
This project has as main protagonist our hero of all times: Twinsen!
 
Fergus asks Twinsen for some gas so he can use his hidroglider, an this is how the story begins!
 
Twinsen takes some gas from he's house at Tiliar Island, but, will he suceed?
What will happen to our hero during his adventure to Lupin Island?
What obstacles will he find?
 
All these questions will be answered when LBA:LID Project is released.
 
The member of this team are:
 
agustin
OBrasilo
 
Until now we have only some few grids and 2 musics
 
Anyone wanting to help this project contact us to [EMAIL="lbacid@gmail.com"]lbacid@gmail.com[/EMAIL]

cooked:
Hi everyone! Sorry that I dindnt post news of the project in all this time.

No, the project is not dead, and we have 2 new members: Allindir and Sonartica.

We have decided the name of the islands Twinsen will develop his adventure and the name of some main characters.

The storyline is more complete and now we have some grids more and a concept art.

Ill try to update news more frequentlly but, this project wil not die!

Anyone wanting to help email me or OBrasilo, or simply post here.

Thanks to all

Agustin, Project Leader
raw:
Hi everyone! Sorry that I dindn't post news of the project in all this time.
 
No, the project is not dead, and we have 2 new members: Allindir and Sonartica.
 
We have decided the name of the islands Twinsen will develop his adventure and the name of some main characters.
 
The storyline is more complete and now we have some grids more and a concept art.
 
I'll try to update news more frequentlly but, this project wil not die!
 
Anyone wanting to help email me or OBrasilo, or simply post here.
 
Thanks to all
 
Agustin, Project Leader

cooked: Thanks for the comments, Im really glad that you guys like my work. All this scenes are extracted directly from my head, I dont copy works from other people, maybe its very similar, but no, I did it myself and I start with one brick and finish with the whole grid. Sometimes I get inspired by the LBA music, its true that it gives you the mood to work. Ill try to make the grid better by following your suggestions, but school started again today and it will be a little more dificult to work for the project. Anyway, Im so good at school that I dont need to study most of the times :). Maybe I will work on it today.
